# Synthetic fixture for the original sound request latch at 1000:165A.
scenario=player_damage_sound
level=1
runtime_cs=1A2B
runtime_ds=2B3C
temp_copy=1
visual_claim=0

break ghidra=1000:7F9A runtime=1A2B:7F9A label=player_damage_sound_request
break ghidra=1000:165A runtime=1A2B:165A label=sound_priority_latch

sound_request label=hurt callsite=1000:7F9A latch=1000:165A cursor=0x002d priority=4 active_before=0 current_priority_before=0 pending_cursor=0x002d pending_priority=4 accepted=1 active_after=1 current_priority_after=4 current_cursor_after=0x002d direct_sweep=0

dump DS:2070
2B3C:2070 00 00 00 00 2d 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
dump DS:78C0
2B3C:78C0 2d 00
dump DS:7990
2B3C:7990 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 04 04
dump DS:79C0
2B3C:79C0 00 00 00 00 01 00 00 00
